per hour · 1 horse
Full access to arena, jumps and fillers. Any time of day.
Optional Add-ons

Second horse or floodlights can be added at checkout — both are optional extras, not included in the standard rate.

Optional add-ons

Second horse (same session)+ £10
Floodlights (any session, if required)+ £5

Arena Information

Arriving: Full address will be sent upon booking confirmation. Arrive at the main house double-gated entrance, follow the sign and path alongside the house down to the arena.

Poo picking: All riders must poo pick the arena once their session is complete. Equipment is provided on site.

Jumps & equipment: You are welcome to use all jumps and fillers during your session — please leave all equipment tidy before you go.

Floodlights: Available as an optional add-on for any session — just select it when booking. An extra £5 applies.

Timing: Slots are booked for one hour. Feel free to arrive a little early if you need time to set up jumps or poles before your session begins.

Safety: Riders use the arena at their own risk. Hats and appropriate footwear must be worn at all times.

✓ Fully Insured Facility
